        max_insert_T = [max_insert_T, current].max
    end

def solve(s)
    n = s.length
    # Compute prefix_L, prefix_C, prefix_T
    prefix_L = Array.new(n+1, 0)
    prefix_C = Array.new(n+1, 0)
    prefix_T = Array.new(n+1, 0)
    (0...n).each do |i|
        prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] == 'L' ? 1 : 0)
        prefix_C[i+1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] == 'C' ? 1 : 0)
        prefix_T[i+1] = prefix_T[i] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
    end

    # Compute count_T_after
    count_T_after = Array.new(n+1, 0)
    (n-1).downto(0) do |i|
        count_T_after[i] = count_T_after[i+1] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
    end

    # Compute sum_T_after_C
    sum_T_after_C = Array.new(n+1, 0)
    (n-1).downto(0) do |i|
        if s[i] == 'C'
            sum_T_after_C[i] = count_T_after[i+1] + sum_T_after_C[i+1]
        else
            sum_T_after_C[i] = sum_T_after_C[i+1]
        end
    end

    # Compute original_count
    original_count = 0
    (0...n).each do |i|
        if s[i] == 'C'
            original_count += prefix_L[i] * count_T_after[i+1]
        end
    end

    # Compute max_insert_L
    max_insert_L = 0
    (0...n+1).each do |i|
        max_insert_L = [max_insert_L, sum_T_after_C[i]].max
    end

    # Compute max_insert_C
    max_insert_C = 0
    (0...n+1).each do |i|
        current = prefix_L[i] * count_T_after[i+1]
        max_insert_C = [max_insert_C, current].max
    end

    # Compute max_insert_T
    max_insert_T = 0
    (0...n+1).each do |i|
        current = prefix_L[i] * prefix_C[i]
        max_insert_T = [max_insert_T, current].max
    end

    total = original_count + [max_insert_L, max_insert_C, max_insert_T].max
    total
end
